title: Avoid parsing metadata stored by the image library
body:
* Retrieve image creation dates from new public fields provided by the storage library.
* Compute image digests using the image manifest.

comments.body: Updated to dig image creation dates out of inspection data.
Will this fix the issue where I see datas showing up as 1970?
